stemHtml: What is the function of an auto-slat system?

options.a: It provides improved handling qualities by retracting the slats at high angles of attack.
options.b: It is activated together with the gear extension in the case that the pilot has failed to select the appropriate slat setting.
options.c: It provides improved stall characteristics at high angles of attack during take-off, approach, and landing.
options.d: It provides for increased endurance during holding operations in icing conditions.
